examples.sentence: 外国へ行くにつけ、勉強するにつけ、言葉の壁にぶつかる。
examples.translation: Whether I go abroad or study, I always encounter language barriers.
examples.translationEn: Whether I go abroad or study, I always encounter language barriers.
examples.romaji: Gaikoku e iku ni tsuke, benkyou suru ni tsuke, kotoba no kabe ni butsukaru.

examples.sentence: 彼と話すにつけ、彼が考えるにつけ、彼の知識に驚かされる。
examples.translation: Whenever I talk to him or hear his thoughts, I'm always amazed by his knowledge.
examples.translationEn: Whenever I talk to him or hear his thoughts, I'm always amazed by his knowledge.
examples.romaji: Kare to hanasu ni tsuke, kare ga kangaeru ni tsuke, kare no chishiki ni odorokasareru.

examples.sentence: この公園で遊ぶにつけ、散歩するにつけ、子供時代を思い出す。
examples.translation: Each time I play or take a walk in this park, it reminds me of my childhood.
examples.translationEn: Each time I play or take a walk in this park, it reminds me of my childhood.
examples.romaji: Kono kouen de asobu ni tsuke, sanpo suru ni tsuke, kodomo jidai wo omoidasu.

examples.sentence: 春につけ、秋につけ、彼は母校を訪れる。
examples.translation: Whether in spring or autumn, he visits his alma mater.
examples.translationEn: Whether in spring or autumn, he visits his alma mater.
examples.romaji: Haru ni tsuke, aki ni tsuke, kare wa bokou wo otozureru.

examples.sentence: 年を取るにつれて、健康に気をつけなければなりません。
examples.translation: As you get older, you have to pay more attention to your health.
examples.translationEn: As you get older, you have to pay more attention to your health.
examples.romaji: Toshi wo toru ni tsurete, kenkou ni ki wo tsukenakereba narimasen.

examples.sentence: 春が近づくにつれて、気温が上がる。
examples.translation: As spring approaches, the temperature rises.
examples.translationEn: As spring approaches, the temperature rises.
examples.romaji: Haru ga chikazuku ni tsurete, kion ga agaru.

examples.sentence: 勉強するにつれて、だんだん分かるようになる。
examples.translation: As I study, I gradually come to understand.
examples.translationEn: As I study, I gradually come to understand.
examples.romaji: Benkyou suru ni tsurete, dandan wakaru you ni naru.

examples.sentence: 経験が増えるにつれて、自信もついてくる。
examples.translation: As your experience increases, so does your confidence.
examples.translationEn: As your experience increases, so does your confidence.
examples.romaji: Keiken ga fueru ni tsurete, jishin mo tsuite kuru.

examples.sentence: 人口が増えるにともなって、交通渋滞も悪化しています。
examples.translation: As the population increases, traffic congestion is also getting worse.
examples.translationEn: As the population increases, traffic congestion is also getting worse.
examples.romaji: Jinkou ga fueru ni tomonatte, koutsuu juutai mo akka shiteimasu.

examples.sentence: 季節の変わり目にともなって、体調を崩しやすくなります。
examples.translation: As the seasons change, it's easier to get out of shape.
examples.translationEn: As the seasons change, it's easier to get out of shape.
examples.romaji: Kisetsu no kawarime ni tomonatte, taichou wo kuzushi yasuku narimasu.

examples.sentence: 経済の成長にともなって、雇用の機会も増えるでしょう。
examples.translation: As the economy grows, employment opportunities will also increase.
examples.translationEn: As the economy grows, employment opportunities will also increase.
examples.romaji: Keizai no seichou ni tomonatte, koyou no kikai mo fueru deshou.

examples.sentence: 彼の昇進にともなって、引っ越しをすることになりました。
examples.translation: As a result of his promotion, we decided to move.
examples.translationEn: As a result of his promotion, we decided to move.
examples.romaji: Kare no shoushin ni tomonatte, hikkoshi wo suru koto ni narimashita.

examples.sentence: 彼の成功は努力にほかならない。
examples.translation: His success is nothing but hard work.
examples.translationEn: His success is nothing but hard work.
examples.romaji: Kare no seikou wa doryoku ni hoka naranai.

examples.sentence: この痛みは寒さにほかならない。
examples.translation: This pain is nothing but the cold.
examples.translationEn: This pain is nothing but the cold.
examples.romaji: Kono itami wa samusa ni hoka naranai.

examples.sentence: 彼の失敗の原因は慢心にほかならない。
examples.translation: The cause of his failure is nothing but overconfidence.
examples.translationEn: The cause of his failure is nothing but overconfidence.
examples.romaji: Kare no shippai no gen'in wa manshin ni hoka naranai.

examples.sentence: 彼女の笑顔は明るさにほかならない。
examples.translation: Her smile is none other than brightness.
examples.translationEn: Her smile is none other than brightness.
examples.romaji: Kanojo no egao wa akarusa ni hoka naranai.

examples.sentence: 忙しいにもかかわらず、彼は毎日運動しています。
examples.translation: Despite being busy, he exercises every day.
examples.translationEn: Despite being busy, he exercises every day.
examples.romaji: Isogashii ni mo kakawarazu, kare wa mainichi undou shiteimasu.

examples.sentence: 雨が降っているにもかかわらず、彼女は散歩に行きました。
examples.translation: Even though it was raining, she went for a walk.
examples.translationEn: Even though it was raining, she went for a walk.
examples.romaji: Ame ga futteiru ni mo kakawarazu, kanojo wa sanpo ni ikimashita.

examples.sentence: 車が古いにもかかわらず、まだよく走ります。
examples.translation: In spite of the car being old, it still runs well.
examples.translationEn: In spite of the car being old, it still runs well.
examples.romaji: Kuruma ga furui ni mo kakawarazu, mada yoku hashirimasu.

examples.sentence: 結果が良くないにもかかわらず、彼は頑張り続けました。
examples.translation: Despite the results not being good, he continued to do his best.
examples.translationEn: Despite the results not being good, he continued to do his best.
examples.romaji: Kekka ga yoku nai ni mo kakawarazu, kare wa ganbari tsuzukemashita.

examples.sentence: この事故は運転手の不注意により起こりました。
examples.translation: This accident occurred due to the driver's carelessness.
examples.translationEn: This accident occurred due to the driver's carelessness.
examples.romaji: Kono jiko wa untenshu no fuchuui ni yori okorimashita.

examples.sentence: その映画は小説により制作されました。
examples.translation: The movie was produced based on the novel.
examples.translationEn: The movie was produced based on the novel.
examples.romaji: Sono eiga wa shousetsu ni yori seisaku saremashita.

examples.sentence: 犯人は警察により逮捕されました。
examples.translation: The criminal was arrested by the police.
examples.translationEn: The criminal was arrested by the police.
examples.romaji: Hannin wa keisatsu ni yori taiho saremashita.

examples.sentence: 会社の成長は従業員の努力により実現しました。
examples.translation: The company's growth was achieved through the efforts of its employees.
examples.translationEn: The company's growth was achieved through the efforts of its employees.
examples.romaji: Kaisha no seichou wa juugyouin no doryoku ni yori jitsugen shimashita.

examples.sentence: 彼女は一年にわたって日本語を勉強しました。
examples.translation: She studied Japanese for over a year.
examples.translationEn: She studied Japanese for over a year.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa ichinen ni watatte nihongo wo benkyou shimashita.

examples.sentence: このプロジェクトは50キロにわたって道路を建設します。
examples.translation: This project will construct roads across 50 kilometers.
examples.translationEn: This project will construct roads across 50 kilometers.
examples.romaji: Kono purojekuto wa gojukiro ni watatte douro wo kensetsu shimasu.

examples.sentence: 彼の著作は数多くの国にわたって読まれている。
examples.translation: His writings are read throughout numerous countries.
examples.translationEn: His writings are read throughout numerous countries.
examples.romaji: Kare no chosaku wa kazu ooku no kuni ni watatte yomarete iru.

examples.sentence: その秘密は世代にわたって保たれ続けた。
examples.translation: The secret was kept over generations.
examples.translationEn: The secret was kept over generations.
examples.romaji: Sono himitsu wa sedai ni watatte tamotsu sareta.

examples.sentence: 会議に先立ち、資料を確認しましょう。
examples.translation: Before the meeting, let's check the materials.
examples.translationEn: Before the meeting, let's check the materials.
examples.romaji: Kaigi ni sakidachi, shiryou wo kakunin shimashou.

examples.sentence: 出発に先立ち、荷物を整理しました。
examples.translation: Before departure, I organized my luggage.
examples.translationEn: Before departure, I organized my luggage.
examples.romaji: Shuppatsu ni sakidachi, nimotsu wo seiri shimashita.

examples.sentence: 就寝に先立ち、歯を磨きます。
examples.translation: Before going to bed, I brush my teeth.
examples.translationEn: Before going to bed, I brush my teeth.
examples.romaji: Shuushin ni sakidachi, ha wo migakimasu.

examples.sentence: 映画の上映に先立ち、予告編が放映されます。
examples.translation: Before the movie screening, the trailers are shown.
examples.translationEn: Before the movie screening, the trailers are shown.
examples.romaji: Eiga no jouei ni sakidachi, yokokuhen ga houei saremasu.
